Class AbstractProblemLoader

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.AbstractProblemLoader
Direct Known Subclasses:
ProblemLoader, SingleThreadProblemLoader
public abstract class AbstractProblemLoader extends Object

This class provides the basic functionality to load something in KeY. The loading process is done in the current Thread and no user interaction is required.

The basic usage of this class is to be subclasses by a problem loader like SingleThreadProblemLoader which should load the file configured by the constructor's arguments. The next step is to call load() which does the loading process and tries to instantiate a proof and to apply rules again if possible. The result of the loading process is available via the getter methods.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractProblemLoader

      protected AbstractProblemLoader(Path file, List<Path> classPath, Path bootClassPath, List<Path> includes, Profile profileOfNewProofs, boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs, ProblemLoaderControl control, boolean askUiToSelectAProofObligationIfNotDefinedByLoadedFile, Properties poPropertiesToForce)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      file - The file or folder to load.
      classPath - The optional class path entries to use.
      bootClassPath - An optional boot class path.
      includes - Optional includes to consider.
      profileOfNewProofs - The Profile to use for new Proofs.
      forceNewProfileOfNewProofs - true profileOfNewProofs will be used as Profile of new proofs, false Profile specified by problem file will be used for new proofs.
      control - The ProblemLoaderControl to use.
      askUiToSelectAProofObligationIfNotDefinedByLoadedFile - true to call ProblemLoaderControl.selectProofObligation(InitConfig) if no Proof is defined by the loaded proof or false otherwise which still allows to work with the loaded InitConfig.

    • load

      public final void load() throws Exception
      Executes the loading process and tries to instantiate a proof and to re-apply rules on it if possible.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
      IOException - Occurred Exception.
      ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception.
      Exception

    • load

      public final void load(Consumer<Proof> callbackProofLoaded) throws Exception
      Executes the loading process and tries to instantiate a proof and to re-apply rules on it if possible.
      Parameters:
      callbackProofLoaded - optional callback, called when the proof is loaded but not yet replayed
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
      IOException - Occurred Exception.
      ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception.
      Exception

    • loadEnvironment

      protected void loadEnvironment() throws ProofInputException, IOException
      Loads and initialized the proof environment.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
      IOException - Occurred Exception.
      See Also:
      • load()

    • selectAndLoadProof

      initConfig - the proof configuration.

      • load()

    • loadSelectedProof

      protected void loadSelectedProof(IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer poContainer, ProofAggregate proofList, Consumer<Proof> callbackProofLoaded)
      Loads a proof from the proof list.
      Parameters:
      poContainer - the container created by createProofObligationContainer().
      proofList - the proof list containing the proof to load.
      callbackProofLoaded - optional callback, called before the proof is replayed
      See Also:
      • load()

    • createFileRepo

      protected FileRepo createFileRepo() throws IOException
      Creates a new FileRepo (with or without consistency) based on the settings.
      Returns:
      a FileRepo that can be used for proof bundle saving
      Throws:
      IOException - if for some reason the FileRepo can not be created (e.g. temporary directory can not be created).

    • createEnvInput

      protected EnvInput createEnvInput(FileRepo fileRepo) throws IOException

      fileRepo - the FileRepo used to ensure consistency between proof and source code
      Returns:
      The created EnvInput.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

      protected IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer createProofObligationContainer() throws Exception
      Creates a IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer if available which contains the ProofOblInput for which a Proof should be instantiated.
      Returns:
      The IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer or null if not available.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.
      Exception

    • createProof

      protected ProofAggregate createProof(IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer poContainer) throws ProofInputException
      Creates a Proof for the given IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer and tries to apply rules again.
      Parameters:
      poContainer - The IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer to instantiate a Proof for.
      Returns:
      The instantiated Proof.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
